sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Trash, Eye, Book } from "react-bootstrap-icons"; import { Card, Button, Container, Row, Col } from "react-bootstrap"; import { Link, useHistory } from "react-router-dom"; function DeckCard({ deck }) { const [count, setCount] = useState(0); useEffect(async () => { const cards = await loadCards(); setCount(cards.length) }, []) return ( {deck.name}

{count} cards

 {deck.description} ) } export default DeckCard;
